Hello, World

June 7, 2026 · meta

First post. The site is up, Jekyll is working, and I haven’t broken anything yet.

This blog is where I’ll document what I’m learning — R, SQL, Python, data analysis, and whatever else catches my interest along the way.

Stay tuned.
